title: Shakshuka Delight
description: This is a 1.20.1 Minecraft mod that adds Shakshuka into the game made by Shakshuk
body:
# Shakshuka Delight

This mod is an addon to ([Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight))

## Additions

Shakshuka - Craftable with 1 Onion, 1 Tomato, 1 Fried egg, and 1 Tomato Sauce (Crafted in Cooking Pot) (gives 3 minutes of Nourishing effect after eating.)

Console - Opens chat when clicked.

Script - Says "This is a script." in chat

Bug - Not fun to eat

## Links

* [Youtube](https://youtube.com/@shakshuk)
* [Curse Forge](https://curseforge.com/members/Shakshuk/projects)
* [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Shakshuk)
